description_long: This is an adult woman standing in a relaxed pose, with one hand resting on her hip and the other hanging by her side. She is dressed in a casual, loose-fitting V-neck top with three-quarter sleeves layered over a shirt, paired with fitted pants. Her footwear consists of wedge-heeled shoes, and her posture suggests confidence and ease. The figure's hair is styled in a short, straight bob with a side part. The clothing fits closely to the body, accentuating a natural human silhouette. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is suitable for an urban street or sidewalk setting.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands with one hand on her hip, wearing a V-neck top, fitted pants, and wedge-heeled shoes, with a short bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neck top, fitted pants, wedge shoes, and hand on hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm hanging down, and the wedge heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the top, pants, and hairstyle, with the hand on hip visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm bent at the hip and the side profile of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual V-neck top with three-quarter sleeves layered over a shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip and one arm relaxed
attribute_hairstyle: short straight bob with side part
